insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FILE_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE ( FILE_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, TYPE_ID, DOWN_COUNT, FILE_EXT, FOLDER_ID, USE_STATUS, CREATE_ID, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES( #fileId#, #fileName#, #filePath#, #fileSize#, #typeId#, #downloadCnt#, #fileExt#, #folderId#, #useStatus#, #createId#, #createName1#, #createName2#, #createDate#, #updateId#, #updateDate#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FILE_ID = #fileId#, FILE_NAME = #fileName#, FILE_PATH = #filePath#, FILE_SIZE = #fileSize#, TYPE_ID = #typeId#, DOWN_COUNT = #downloadCnt#, FILE_EXT = #fileExt#, FOLDER_ID = #folderId#, USE_STATUS = #useStatus#, CREATE_ID = #createId#, CREATE_NAME1 = #createName1#, CREATE_NAME2 = #createName2#, CREATE_DATE = #createDate#, UPDATE_ID = #updateId#, UPDATE_DATE = #updateDate#, TENANT_ID = #tenantId# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CONVERT(FILE_ID, UNSIGNED INTEGER)),-1) as maxno FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME AS FOLDER_NAME, FOLDER_TYPE AS FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP AS FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER AS FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, DATE_ADD(CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CONVERT(LOG_ID, UNSIGNED INTEGER)),-1) as maxno FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = #extension# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE, TYPE_ID AS TYPE_ID, DOWN_COUNT AS DOWN_COUNT, FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT, FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME AS FOLDER_NAME, FOLDER_TYPE AS FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP AS FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER AS FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, DATE_ADD(CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME AS FOLDER_NAME, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME AS FOLDER_NAME, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUpper# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET USE_STATUS = "N" WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FILE_NAME = #name# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FOLDER_ID = #folderId# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT FILE_ID , FILE_NAME , FILE_PATH , FILE_SIZE , TYPE_ID , DOWN_COUNT , FILE_EXT , FOLDER_ID , USE_STATUS , CREATE_ID , CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, CREATE_DATE , UPDATE_ID , UPDATE_DATE , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_EXT LIKE if(#searchExt# != '', CONCAT('%',#searchExt#,'%') ,FILE_EXT) AND CREATE_NAME1 LIKE if(#searchCreateName# != '', CONCAT('%',#searchCreateName#,'%') , CREATE_NAME1) AND TYPE_ID LIKE IF ( #searchFileType# != '',CONCAT('%',#searchFileType#,'%'), TYPE_ID) AND FILE_NAME LIKE IF ( #searchFileName# != '',CONCAT('%',#searchFileName#,'%'), FILE_NAME) AND FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
